goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:15' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:15 and should depart from broxbourne
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
